title: Phantom Armor
description: This mod adds armor made from phantom leather. The perfect counter to those pesky phantoms!
body:
Currently made in MCreator, plans for a proper remake are planned but likely will not happen soon.

### Notice:
**Due to Mcreator's fabric plugin unfortunately being abandoned, fabric updates will be delayed for the foreseeable future. Forge updates will continue as normal, and NeoForge releases are planned, but due to MCreator limitation, Forge and NeoForge releases may not be for the same versions.**

**If you have an issue leave a comment on the curseforge page, linked as the issue tracker** (best I can do for an issue tracker at the moment)

Do you get tired of playing sky block and those pesky phantoms keep knocking you off the edge? Or just generally find phantoms annoying and wish their membranes had more use? Well say no more! With this mod you can craft together 2 phantom membranes to make one phantom leather, and with that phantom leather you can make phantom armor! Phantom armor is placed in between iron and diamond on the durability and defense, but has twice the knockback resistance of netherite, making it the perfect counter to those annoying sky menaces, if you're willing to kill enough that is.

With it's high durability and defense, it's viable for just about any situation that values knock back resistance over extra defense, as well as makes armor less of a hassle on sky island challenges.

If you're crazy enough, you can cook one phantom leather into a regular leather on a campfire if you so desire.
